---
title: "Courses"
description: |
  Below are lists of related courses taken at undergraduate and graduate institutions. 
---
 
### Univetsity of California, Irvine

* STATS 200A  - Intermediate Probability and Statistical Theory 
* STATS 210 - Statistical Methods I: Linear Models
* STATS 295 - Advanced R

### Cal Poly Pomona

* STA 4250 - Survival Analysis
* STA 4320 - Applied Regression Analysis
* STA 5250 - Time Series Analysis
* STA 5320 - Linear Statistical Models
* MAT 3800 - Mathematics of Operation Research I
* MAT 3810 - Mathematics of Operation Research II
* MAT 4800 - Mathematical Programming
